creative_premise: Pressure becomes heredity: plants generated by touch carry bounded visible traits, and the newest pair can produce a hybrid whose morphology recombines both parents.

local_node_test.method_limit: The test was executed against byte-identical reconstructed source in an isolated Node runtime, not against a fresh GitHub checkout.

verification.github_workflow: No workflow run was associated with the workflow commit when inspected.

accessibility.hybrid_action: button is keyboard-focusable and disabled until two plants exist
accessibility.status: trait and hybrid state are announced through an aria-live output
accessibility.reduced_motion: existing reduced-motion behavior remains in place
accessibility.keyboard: Space plants; X crosses the newest pair when available

independence_boundary: This is a playable finite ecology with no Mirror Cartographer explanation, research dashboard, user profiling, diagnosis, conversion funnel, or payment logic.
rollback: Revert commits 3d36ba2142e1edfb1c240e17245df50e5511f87c, f0c958cb48d61192b9ef4717c22d683b195700bc, cabea1d3da95c3ed628a77496b8b62beeaa472a4, and 6bd3f76ae5a886568fbe9074bd04603b022c6dd7 in reverse order; no files or history need deletion.
limits: No browser rendering or pointer interaction was observed in this run.
No GitHub Pages URL or served commit identity was observed.
The ecology is deterministic only for identical numeric inputs and lineage strings; runtime touch coordinates naturally vary.
The model represents fictional visible plant traits, not biological simulation or claims about users.
